action_set_definitions.name: get_submission_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full current state of a specific tax submission, including verification status, financial data, and identity verification status.

submission_id.description: The unique identifier for the tax return (e.g., 'TAX-MNE-2024-002').

action_set_definitions.name: get_market_benchmarks
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves industry-standard financial benchmarks (Q1, Median, Q3) for a specific NAICS code to perform arm's-length analysis.

naics_code.description: The NAICS code for the industry classification (e.g., '423450').

action_set_definitions.name: apply_margin_adjustment
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the submission's financial records by adjusting the operating margin to a target benchmark value.

submission_id.description: The unique identifier for the tax return.

target_margin.description: The new operating margin to be applied (e.g., the median value).

action_set_definitions.name: finalize_submission_status
action_set_definitions.description: Transitions the tax return to its final processing state (ACCEPTED or REJECTED).

submission_id.description: The unique identifier for the tax return.

state_description.submission_id: Unique identifier for the tax return submission.
state_description.document_registry: A map of document types to their current status (e.g., 'W-2': 'RECEIVED', '1099': 'MISSING').
state_description.reported_income_total: The sum of all income reported by the taxpayer.
state_description.verified_income_total: The sum of income confirmed against official third-party records (e.g., IRS transcripts).
state_description.deduction_claims: List of deduction objects containing amount and verification status.
state_description.audit_flags: Specific reasons why the return has been flagged (e.g., 'Income mismatch', 'Invalid SSN').
state_description.taxpayer_identity_verified: True if the SSN/ITIN and name match government records.
